top3.sql:
SELECT MIN(lapTimes.time) 
FROM lapTimes 
JOIN drivers ON lapTimes.driverId = drivers.driverId 
WHERE drivers.surname = 'Hamilton' AND drivers.forename = 'Lewis';

SELECT MIN(lapTimes.time) 
FROM lapTimes 
JOIN drivers ON lapTimes.driverId = drivers.driverId 
WHERE drivers.surname = 'Hamilton' AND drivers.forename = 'Lewis';

SELECT MIN(lapTimes.time) AS fastest_lap_time
FROM lapTimes
JOIN drivers ON lapTimes.driverId = drivers.driverId
WHERE drivers.surname = 'Hamilton' AND drivers.forename = 'Lewis';

SELECT MIN(lapTimes.milliseconds) 
FROM lapTimes 
JOIN drivers ON lapTimes.driverId = drivers.driverId 
WHERE drivers.surname = 'Hamilton' AND drivers.forename = 'Lewis';
